description: Director moves — surfaces the goal-defining metrics that let the operator tell at a glance whether director moves are happening. Cc-task: director-moves-grafana-panel. Pairs with the H3 audio-recovery dashboard (#2340), per-stage RMS dashboard (#2357), and the cadence-bump stale-intent timer (#2367). Some panels render empty until upstream consumers ship: u4-micromove-advance-tick-consumer (panel 3), u5-verb-prometheus-counter-and-consumer (panel 4), u8-compositor-preset-bias-consumer (no metric directly — surfaces via random_mode_transition picks). Folder routing is operator-managed in Grafana DB; tags route to Hapax/Director.

panels.description: Random-mode chain-change transition picks per capability name. Source: shared/director_observability.py::emit_transition_pick (Phase 7 of #166). Each tick that the random_mode chain-changer recruits a transition writes one increment here. Sustained zero rate means the director isn't recruiting transitions — either chain-change is suppressed or the capability gate is rejecting picks.
panels.title: transition picks (5m rate, per capability)

panels.description: Active compositor layout. Source: agents/studio_compositor/metrics.py — value 1.0 for the currently-active layout, 0 for others. Sum over label set = 1 at all times (modulo a microsecond gap during swap). Operator can see at-a-glance which layout is live; layout flips show up as the high-bar moving across labels.
panels.title: compositor layout active (per layout)

panels.description: Per-slot micromove tick advances. Source: u4-micromove-advance-tick-consumer (cc-task pending — panel renders empty until u4 ships). When live, sustained per-slot rate confirms the slot's micromove cycle is advancing in lockstep with director ticks; gaps signal that the consumer is suppressing advance for some condition.

defaults.noValue: no data — u4 consumer not yet shipped

panels.title: micromove advances (5m rate, per slot — pending u4)

panels.description: Semantic verb consumption per verb × outcome. Source: u5-verb-prometheus-counter-and-consumer (cc-task pending — panel renders empty until u5 ships). When live, the verb labels ("contemplate", "juxtapose", etc.) tell the operator which director vocabulary is being recruited; the outcome label ("applied" / "refused" / "deferred") tells whether downstream consumers honored the verb.

defaults.noValue: no data — u5 consumer not yet shipped

panels.title: semantic verb consumption (5m rate — pending u5)

panels.description: Novelty-shift impingement emissions per outcome. Source: agents/novelty_emitter — already shipped via u3-novelty-shift-impingement-emitter (closed). "dispatched" = the gqi-shift detector fired a novelty.shift impingement and the consumer accepted it. "absorbed" = detector fired but the consumer chose to suppress (e.g. inside hold-open window). Sustained zero on both means the gqi signal is flat — operator can verify the detector is alive by checking the gqi feed.
panels.title: novelty-shift impingement emissions (5m rate, per outcome)

title: Hapax / Director / Moves
